---
title: "Trends & Time Series"
subtitle: "Trend breaks, seasonality, baselines, and anomalies"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: patterns-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, categories, description]
---

::: {.section-label}
Analysis Playbook · Trends & Time Series
:::

How to show whether a trajectory actually changed — dynamic baselines that respect
seasonality, trend breaks you can defend, and the difference between an anomaly and
ordinary variance.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**🚧 In progress** — entries coming soon.
:::

::: {#patterns-listing}
:::
